name: arpit-brain-trainer
description: Arpit Brain Trainer — Enhanced autonomous AI agent for Adarsh Moneymaker pipeline with smart escalation, priority engine, and weekly goal tracking

scripts.status: node -e "import('./src/memory.js').then(m => { const mem = new m.BrainMemory(); console.log(JSON.stringify(mem.getState(), null, 2)); })"
scripts.weekly-report: node -e "import('./src/weekly-tracker.js').then(m => { const t = new m.WeeklyTracker(); console.log(t.getWeeklyReport()); })"
